title: paraeremostachys paniculata
intro: Paraeremostachys paniculata, also known as Paniculata or Thai lemongrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Paraeremostachys paniculata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Paraeremostachys paniculata can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
